title: Raccoon Removal in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn. Safe, humane wildlife control for your brownstone or apartment. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for a free estimate!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Boerum Hill, drawn to the neighborhood's tree-lined streets, historic brownstones, and abundant food sources. These intelligent animals can cause significant property damage by tearing into attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces while creating health hazards with their waste. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert raccoon removal services throughout Boerum Hill, using humane methods to safely relocate raccoons and protect your home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience serving Boerum Hill residents with safe, effective raccoon removal solutions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's historic architecture and work quickly to eliminate raccoon problems while preventing future infestations with comprehensive exclusion services.
localContext: Boerum Hill's charming brownstones and proximity to the Gowanus Canal create ideal conditions for raccoon activity, particularly along tree-lined streets like State Street and near green spaces around the Brooklyn House of Detention site. The neighborhood's mix of historic homes and newer developments requires specialized wildlife control expertise to protect both architectural integrity and resident safety.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Boerum Hill?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Boerum Hill typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points, and required repairs. A single raccoon in an accessible attic will cost less than a family of raccoons requiring extensive exclusion work and damage repair to a historic brownstone.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Boerum Hill brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons frequently target Boerum Hill's brownstones because these historic buildings often have chimneys, roof gaps, and older venting systems that provide easy access. The neighborhood's mature trees and proximity to food sources make it particularly attractive to raccoons seeking shelter, especially during breeding season in spring and fall.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Boerum Hill property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Boerum Hill residents in most cases. The removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on whether babies are present and the complexity of the situation. We conduct a thorough inspection, humanely trap and relocate the raccoons, then seal all entry points to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: Will raccoons damage my Boerum Hill home?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can cause extensive damage to homes in Boerum Hill by tearing insulation, chewing through electrical wiring, damaging roof shingles, and contaminating areas with urine and feces. They can also destroy historic architectural details while gaining entry. Prompt removal is essential to minimize damage and protect your property value in this desirable Brooklyn neighborhood.
